problem id: f929c6cc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  11011110 -> 11011011
  11011011 -> 01111011
  00011101 -> 10100011
  01110100 -> 10001110
  01111000 -> 00001111
  10000101 -> 10110000
  11111011 -> 01111111
  11011100 -> 10011011
  01001100 -> 10001001
  11010001 -> 00111010

query: 10001100
predicted answer: 10010001
